title: Banks can offer stablecoins without touching custody, Circle partner explains how
excerpt: Matera, in partnership with Circle, offers a solution that lets banks offer stablecoins without custody risks, overcoming major operational and adoption barriers.
body:
Matera, in partnership with Circle, offers a solution that lets banks offer stablecoins without custody risks, overcoming major operational and adoption barriers.

Discover how Matera, in partnership with USDC issuer Circle, is removing key barriers for banks to offer stablecoins—without taking on custody risks. This approach could pave the way for mainstream adoption, enabling banks to integrate stablecoins into services far beyond payments.
